# CareerNow

CareerNow is an all-in-one, AI-powered career platform that helps job seekers create ATS-optimized resumes, find jobs, prepare for interviews, and manage their full job search.

## Who it's for
- Job seekers (entry-level to executive)
- Career changers and returners
- Students and new graduates
- Career coaches and recruiters (Enterprise)

## Main use cases
- Build ATS-friendly resumes with 6 professional templates and AI optimization
- Generate tailored cover letters and follow-up emails
- Search jobs across 14+ job boards (LinkedIn, Indeed, RemoteOK, We Work Remotely, etc.)
- Practice interviews with AI feedback
- Track applications, analyze skills gaps, and plan career paths
- Optimize LinkedIn profiles and research target companies

## Pricing
- Free: limited preview access
- Pro: $12/month — full builder, unlimited downloads, 50 job searches/day
- Enterprise: $39/month — unlimited searches, team features

## Resources
- Product overview: /product.md
- Pricing details: /pricing.md
- FAQ: /faq.md

## Contact
Website: https://careernow.xyz

## Pages
- [Home](/): AI career platform overview and product entry point.
- [AI Resume Builder](/ai-resume-builder): Free AI resume builder tailored to any role.
- [Free Resume Templates](/free-resume-templates): Six ATS-friendly templates with live preview.
- [Resume Builder](/resume-builder): Editor with 6 templates and live ATS scoring.
- [Resume Checker](/resume-checker): Score an existing resume against ATS rules.
- [Tailored Resume](/tailored-resume): Onboarding flow that tailors a resume to a job description.
- [Job Search](/job-search): Search 14+ job boards including LinkedIn, Indeed, RemoteOK.
- [Job Search Tools](/job-search-tools): Landing hub for AI job-search features.
- [Smart Apply](/smart-apply): AI tailors resume + cover letter and opens the employer apply URL.
- [Cover Letter Generator](/cover-letter-generator): AI-generated tailored cover letters.
- [Interview Practice](/interview-practice): AI interview practice with feedback.
- [Salary Estimator](/salary-estimator): Estimate salaries by role and location.
- [LinkedIn Optimizer](/linkedin-optimizer): Optimize a LinkedIn profile for recruiters.
- [Company Research](/company-research): Research target companies before applying.
- [Resume Examples](/resume-examples): Gallery of recruiter-tested resume samples.
- [Chrome Extension](/chrome-extension): One-click autofill across Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby.
- [Get Started](/get-started): Guided onboarding for new users.
